posts.text:
President Trump wants Congress to pass the SAVE Act. He says it's about voter fraud. Some form of voter ID could make sense. But this particular bill could also block millions of eligible Americans from casting a ballot. 

Meanwhile, the country is deeply divided; public faith in free and fair elections is slipping fast. Our democracy runs on trustworthy elections — and right now that trust is imperiled.

Is a “grand bargain” on voting possible? What would a comprehensive agreement that restored

I am back after attending two days of celebration of life ceremonies for the Reverend Jesse Louis Jackson.

I was blown away and humbled by how much impact one human life can have.

Reverend Jackson was born in segregation and poverty. Yet three former U.S. presidents, a former U.S. vice president and three sitting heads of state were among the thousands of people who showed up for his funerals.

Read my full reflection here: open.substack.com/pub/vanjon…
Rev. Jesse Jackson: Hero of Hope - substack.com/home/post/p-188…

Rev. Jesse Louis Jackson, 1941–2026. No equal. No sequel. Rest in power.

Video

Without Jesse Jackson’s 1984 and 1988 campaigns, there is no President Barack Obama. Period. 
That’s not opinion. That’s history. It’s time to put respect on his name. He earned it. And then some.

Video

He didn’t just register voters. He manufactured HOPE. He made millions of people believe that the highest office in the land wasn’t off-limits to someone who looked like them.

Video

He took a country that wanted to put Black ambition in a box — and he blew the box apart. Twice. On national television. In front of the whole world.

Video
Let me tell you what Rev. Jesse Jackson actually did. 🧵

My “World War 3 + Gray War” post yesterday sparked a lot of commentary, with some casting doubt on my grasp of foreign policy.

Meanwhile, I’m here in Chicago to pay my respects to one of my greatest heroes. So I’ll let him handle this one. 

Rev. Jesse Jackson. Chicago. 1984.

Video

Van Jones (@VanJones68)

Based on the comment section from my last post, many of you may not have seen my full “World War Three” argument yet. …Here’s the complete video.

Based on the comment section from my last post, many of you may not have seen my full “World War Three” argument yet. …Here’s the complete video.

World War Three has started - vanjones.substack.com/p/worl…

Something strange is happening in the information war.

Young Americans defending regimes like the Islamic Republic of Iran that jail protesters, strip women of rights and execute people for being gay.

Self-described patriots on the right suddenly echoing narratives that benefit a country like Russia — which is openly hostile to the United States.

How does that happen?

Not through tanks or missiles.

Post by post, people get pulled into camps that don’t actually serve their own country or the

World War III has already begun. It’s just different from World War II.

It started long before the U.S. strikes on Iran. And it will continue long after. That’s because this is a “gray war.” Most of the time, the fight isn’t loud. It’s subtle. It runs through your phone. Algorithms are the weapons. Division is the strategy.

The main goal is to turn America on itself.

The video below connects the dots. Watch it, then decide what side of this gray war you’re on.

World War Three has started - o

Yesterday the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran and killed their Supreme Leader. Now the news cycle is moving onto “NOW WHAT??”

For those of you who are unfamiliar - meet Reza Pahlavi. When millions took to the streets protesting the regime, they chanted his name.

Important history: Reza Pahlavi is the son of the former Shah of Iran. He has lived in exile for 47 years while his people suffered.

Here’s the key: He does NOT want to return as a king. He does NOT want a throne. He wants to return as
